description: Search award flights and explore credit-card points redemptions on Pointhound.

tools.name: offers_filter_options
tools.description: Get the filterable facets (card programs, airline programs, airlines) available for a given search session. Required: search-id. Returns the FilterOptions.

tools.name: offers_list
tools.description: List flight offers for an existing search session, with optional filters and sort. Required: search-id. Optional: take, offset, sort-by (plus 7 more). Returns the OfferListResponse.

params.name: search-id
params.description: Pointhound search session id (ofs_*). Obtain by visiting a Pointhound search results URL and copying the searchId from the network log, or by running `pointhound-pp-cli search` once cookies are imported.

params.name: take
params.description: Maximum number of offers to return (page size).

params.name: sort-by
params.description: Sort field: points, duration, or departsAt.

params.name: cabins
params.description: Comma-separated cabin classes to include: economy, premium_economy, business, first.

params.name: airlines
params.description: Comma-separated airline IDs (aln_* values from filter-options).

params.name: airline-programs
params.description: Comma-separated airline frequent flyer program IDs (prp_* values).

params.name: card-programs
params.description: Comma-separated transferable points program IDs (pep_* values).

params.name: stops
params.description: Comma-separated stop counts to include (0 for nonstop, 1, 2, etc.).
